title: Archaeologists discover evidence of prehistoric island settlers

sentences.en: In early April 2019, Dr Ceri Shipton and his colleagues from Australian National University became the first archaeologists to explore Obi, one of many tropical islands in Indonesia's Maluku Utara province.
sentences.zh: 2019年4月初，塞里·希普顿博士和他来自澳大利亚国立大学的同事们，成为首批对奥比岛进行考察的考古学家；奥比是印度尼西亚北马鲁古省众多热带岛屿之一。

grammar.type: 主系表 + 不定式后置定语 + 同位语
grammar.note: 主干是 Dr Ceri Shipton and his colleagues became the first archaeologists；from Australian National University 为介词短语修饰 colleagues；to explore Obi 为不定式作 archaeologists 的后置定语；one of many tropical islands... 为 Obi 的同位语。

sentences.en: The research team's discoveries suggest that the prehistoric people who lived on Obi were adept on both land and sea, hunting in the dense rainforest, foraging on the seashore, and possibly even voyaging between islands.
sentences.zh: 研究团队的发现表明，生活在奥比岛上的史前人类在陆地和海上都很擅长活动——他们在茂密的雨林中狩猎，在海岸边觅食，甚至可能还在岛屿之间航行。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 定语从句 + 现在分词并列状语
grammar.note: 主干是 The research team's discoveries suggest that...，that 引导宾语从句；从句主干 the prehistoric people were adept on both land and sea，who lived on Obi 为定语从句修饰 people；hunting... foraging... voyaging 三个现在分词短语并列作伴随状语，具体说明 adept 的表现。

sentences.en: The excavations were part of a project to learn more about how people first dispersed from mainland Asia, through the Indonesian archipelago and into the prehistoric continent that once connected Australia and New Guinea.
sentences.zh: 这些发掘是一个项目的一部分，该项目旨在进一步了解人类最初是如何从亚洲大陆出发，穿越印度尼西亚群岛，进入那片曾经连接澳大利亚与新几内亚的史前大陆的。

grammar.type: 不定式作定语 + how 宾语从句 + 定语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 The excavations were part of a project；to learn more about... 为不定式作 project 的后置定语；how people first dispersed... 为宾语从句，from... through... into... 三个介词短语构成人类迁徙的路径；that once connected... 为定语从句修饰 continent。

sentences.en: The team's earlier research suggested that the northernmost islands in the group, known as the Wallacean islands, including Obi, would have offered the easiest migration route.
sentences.zh: 该团队早先的研究表明，这一群岛中最北端的岛屿——即所谓的瓦拉西亚群岛，包括奥比岛在内——本应提供了最便捷的迁徙路线。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 过去分词插入语 + 虚拟推测
grammar.note: 主干是 The team's earlier research suggested that...；从句主干 the northernmost islands would have offered the easiest migration route，would have offered 表对过去的推测；known as the Wallacean islands 与 including Obi 为插入的修饰成分，说明这些岛屿。

sentences.en: It also seemed likely that these islands were crucial 'stepping stones' on humans' island-hopping voyages through this region millennia ago.
sentences.zh: 同样很有可能的是，数千年前，在人类穿越这一地区、逐岛跳跃的航行中，这些岛屿是至关重要的“垫脚石”。

grammar.type: It 形式主语 + that 主语从句
grammar.note: It 为形式主语，真正主语是 that these islands were crucial 'stepping stones'；on humans' island-hopping voyages 为介词短语作状语，through this region 与 millennia ago 进一步限定航行的范围与时间。

sentences.en: But to support this idea, they needed archaeological evidence for humans living in this remote area in the ancient past.
sentences.zh: 但为了支持这一观点，他们需要能证明远古时期有人类曾在这一偏远地区生活的考古证据。

grammar.type: 不定式目的状语 + 现在分词后置定语
grammar.note: to support this idea 为不定式作目的状语；主干是 they needed archaeological evidence；for humans living in this remote area 为介词短语作 evidence 的后置定语，其中 living... 为现在分词修饰 humans；in the ancient past 为时间状语。

sentences.en: So, they travelled to Obi to look for sites that might reveal evidence of early occupation.
sentences.zh: 于是，他们前往奥比岛，寻找可能揭示早期人类居住证据的遗址。

grammar.type: 不定式目的状语 + 定语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 they travelled to Obi；to look for sites 为不定式作目的状语；that might reveal evidence of early occupation 为定语从句修饰 sites。

sentences.en: Just inland from the village of Kelo on Obi's northern coast, Shipton and his colleagues found two caves containing prehistoric rock shelters that were suitable for excavation.
sentences.zh: 在奥比岛北岸凯洛村稍靠内陆的地方，希普顿和同事们发现了两个洞穴，里面有适合发掘的史前岩石庇护所。

grammar.type: 地点状语前置 + 现在分词定语 + 定语从句
grammar.note: Just inland from the village of Kelo... 为地点状语前置；主干是 Shipton and his colleagues found two caves；containing prehistoric rock shelters 为现在分词短语修饰 caves；that were suitable for excavation 为定语从句修饰 rock shelters。

sentences.en: With the permission and help of the local people of Kelo, they dug a small test excavation in each shelter.
sentences.zh: 在凯洛当地居民的允许和帮助下，他们在每个庇护所里都进行了一次小规模的试掘。

grammar.type: with 伴随状语 + 主谓宾
grammar.note: With the permission and help of the local people of Kelo 为 with 引导的伴随/条件状语；主干是 they dug a small test excavation；in each shelter 为地点状语。

sentences.en: There they found numerous artefacts, including fragments of axes, some dating to about 14,000 years ago.
sentences.zh: 在那里，他们发现了大量人工制品，包括斧头的碎片，其中一些可追溯到约14,000年前。

grammar.type: 地点状语前置 + 独立主格结构
grammar.note: There 为地点状语前置；主干是 they found numerous artefacts；including fragments of axes 为举例；some dating to about 14,000 years ago 为独立主格结构（some + 现在分词），补充说明这些碎片的年代。

sentences.en: The earliest axes at Kelo were made using clam shells.
sentences.zh: 凯洛遗址最早的斧头是用蛤蜊壳制成的。

grammar.type: 被动语态 + 现在分词状语
grammar.note: 主干是 The earliest axes were made，为被动语态；using clam shells 为现在分词短语作方式状语，说明制作所用的材料。

sentences.en: Axes made from clam shells from roughly the same time had also previously been found elsewhere in this region, including on the nearby island of Gebe to the northeast.
sentences.zh: 大致同一时期、用蛤蜊壳制成的斧头，此前也曾在这一地区的其他地方被发现，包括东北方向邻近的格贝岛上。

grammar.type: 过去分词定语 + 过去完成时被动
grammar.note: 主干是 Axes had also previously been found，为过去完成时被动；made from clam shells 为过去分词短语修饰 Axes；from roughly the same time 说明年代；including on the nearby island of Gebe... 为举例状语。

sentences.en: As on Gebe, it is highly likely that Obi's axes were used in the construction of canoes, thus allowing these early peoples to maintain connections between communities on neighbouring islands.
sentences.zh: 和在格贝岛一样，奥比岛的斧头很可能被用于建造独木舟，从而使这些早期族群得以维系邻近岛屿上各社群之间的联系。

grammar.type: It 形式主语 + 主语从句 + 现在分词结果状语
grammar.note: As on Gebe 为比较状语；it 为形式主语，真正主语是 that Obi's axes were used in the construction of canoes；thus allowing these early peoples to maintain connections... 为现在分词短语作结果状语，allow sb to do 表“使某人能够做”。

sentences.en: The oldest cultural layers from the Kelo site provided the team with the earliest record for human occupation on Obi, dating back around 18,000 years.
sentences.zh: 凯洛遗址最古老的文化层为该团队提供了奥比岛上人类居住的最早记录，可追溯到约18,000年前。

grammar.type: provide sb with sth + 现在分词状语
grammar.note: 主干是 The oldest cultural layers provided the team with the earliest record，provide sb with sth 表“向某人提供某物”；for human occupation on Obi 修饰 record；dating back around 18,000 years 为现在分词短语补充说明年代。

sentences.en: At this time the climate was drier and colder than today, and the island's dense rainforests would likely have been much less impenetrable than they are now.
sentences.zh: 在那个时期，气候比今天更干燥、更寒冷，岛上茂密的雨林很可能远不如现在这般难以穿越。

grammar.type: 并列句 + 比较级 + 虚拟推测
grammar.note: and 连接两个分句。前句主干 the climate was drier and colder than today；后句主干 the island's dense rainforests would likely have been much less impenetrable than they are now，would have been 表对过去的推测，much less impenetrable 为比较级，than they are now 为比较状语从句。

words.def: 无法穿越的；难以进入的

sentences.en: Sea levels were about 120 metres lower, meaning Obi was a much larger island, encompassing what is today the separate island of Bisa, as well as several other small islands nearby.
sentences.zh: 当时海平面比现在低约120米，这意味着奥比是一个大得多的岛屿，涵盖了如今独立的比萨岛，以及附近其他几个小岛。

grammar.type: 现在分词结果状语 + 宾语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 Sea levels were about 120 metres lower；meaning... 为现在分词短语作结果状语；其后 Obi was a much larger island 为 meaning 的宾语从句；encompassing what is today the separate island of Bisa 为现在分词修饰 island，what 引导名词性从句作 encompassing 的宾语。

sentences.en: Roughly 11,700 years ago, as the most recent ice age ended, the climate became significantly warmer and wetter, no doubt making Obi's jungle much thicker.
sentences.zh: 大约在11,700年前，随着最近一次冰河期的结束，气候变得明显更温暖、更湿润，这无疑使奥比岛的丛林变得茂密许多。

grammar.type: as 时间状语从句 + 现在分词结果状语
grammar.note: Roughly 11,700 years ago 为时间状语；as the most recent ice age ended 为 as 引导的时间状语从句；主干是 the climate became significantly warmer and wetter；no doubt making Obi's jungle much thicker 为现在分词短语作结果状语。

sentences.en: According to the researchers, it is no coincidence that around this time the first axes crafted from stone rather than sea shells appear, likely in response to their heavy-duty use for clearing and modification of the increasingly dense rainforest.
sentences.zh: 据研究人员称，大约在这一时期，首批用石头而非贝壳制成的斧头出现，这绝非巧合——这很可能是为了应对它们在清理和改造日益茂密的雨林时的重度使用需求。

grammar.type: It 形式主语 + that 主语从句 + 过去分词定语
grammar.note: According to the researchers 为插入语；it 为形式主语，真正主语是 that 从句；从句主干 the first axes appear，crafted from stone rather than sea shells 为过去分词短语修饰 axes；likely in response to their heavy-duty use... 为补充说明原因。

sentences.en: While stone takes about twice as long to grind into an axe compared to shell, the harder material keeps its sharp edge for longer.
sentences.zh: 虽然把石头磨制成斧头所花的时间大约是贝壳的两倍，但这种更硬的材料能让锋利的刃口保持得更久。

grammar.type: While 让步状语从句 + 倍数比较
grammar.note: While 引导让步/对比从句 stone takes about twice as long to grind into an axe compared to shell，twice as long as 为倍数比较；主句是 the harder material keeps its sharp edge for longer。

sentences.en: Judging by the bones which the researchers unearthed in the Kelo caves, people living there mainly hunted the Rothschild's cuscus, a possum-like creature that still lives on Obi today.
sentences.zh: 从研究人员在凯洛洞穴中挖掘出的骨头来判断，生活在那里的人们主要猎捕罗斯柴尔德袋貂——一种至今仍生活在奥比岛上的、类似负鼠的动物。

grammar.type: 分词独立状语 + 定语从句 + 同位语
grammar.note: Judging by the bones... 为分词短语作评注性状语，which the researchers unearthed... 为定语从句修饰 bones；主干是 people mainly hunted the Rothschild's cuscus，living there 为现在分词修饰 people；a possum-like creature that... 为 cuscus 的同位语，含 that 定语从句。

sentences.en: As the forest grew more dense, people probably used axes to clear patches of forest and make hunting easier.
sentences.zh: 随着森林变得越来越茂密，人们很可能用斧头清理出一片片林地，让狩猎变得更容易。

grammar.type: as 时间状语从句 + 不定式目的状语
grammar.note: As the forest grew more dense 为 as 引导的时间状语从句；主干是 people probably used axes；to clear patches of forest and make hunting easier 为不定式作目的状语，clear 与 make 由 and 并列。

sentences.en: Shipton's team's excavation of the shelters at the Kelo site unearthed a volcanic glass substance called obsidian, which must have been brought over from another island, as there is no known source on Obi.
sentences.zh: 希普顿团队对凯洛遗址各庇护所的发掘，出土了一种叫黑曜石的火山玻璃物质；它一定是从另一座岛屿带来的，因为奥比岛上没有已知的产源。

grammar.type: 过去分词定语 + 非限制性定语从句 + as 原因状语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 Shipton's team's excavation unearthed a volcanic glass substance；called obsidian 为过去分词修饰 substance；which must have been brought over from another island 为非限制性定语从句，must have been 表对过去的肯定推测；as there is no known source on Obi 为 as 引导的原因状语从句。

sentences.en: It also revealed particular types of beads, similar to those previously found on islands in southern Wallacea.
sentences.zh: 发掘还发现了几种特定类型的珠子，与此前在南瓦拉西亚各岛屿上发现的珠子相似。

grammar.type: 主谓宾 + 形容词短语后置定语
grammar.note: 主干是 It also revealed particular types of beads；similar to those previously found on islands... 为形容词短语作后置定语修饰 beads，those 指代 beads，previously found... 为过去分词修饰 those。

sentences.en: These finds again support the idea that Obi islanders routinely travelled to other islands.
sentences.zh: 这些发现再次支持了这样一种观点：奥比岛民经常前往其他岛屿。

grammar.type: 主谓宾 + 同位语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 These finds again support the idea；that Obi islanders routinely travelled to other islands 为同位语从句，说明 idea 的具体内容。

sentences.en: The excavations suggest people successfully lived in the two Kelo shelters for about 10,000 years.
sentences.zh: 这些发掘表明，人们在凯洛的两个庇护所里成功地生活了大约10,000年。

grammar.type: 宾语从句（省略 that）
grammar.note: 主干是 The excavations suggest...，suggest 后接省略了 that 的宾语从句 people successfully lived in the two Kelo shelters；for about 10,000 years 为时间状语。

sentences.en: But then, about 8,000 years ago, both were abandoned.
sentences.zh: 但随后，大约在8,000年前，这两处庇护所都被废弃了。

grammar.type: 被动语态 + 时间状语
grammar.note: But then 承接转折；about 8,000 years ago 为时间状语；主干是 both were abandoned，为被动语态，both 指代前文的两个庇护所。

sentences.en: Did the residents leave Obi completely, or move elsewhere on the island?
sentences.zh: 居民们是彻底离开了奥比岛，还是搬到了岛上的其他地方？

grammar.type: 选择疑问句
grammar.note: 本句为一般疑问引出的选择疑问句，由 or 连接两个并列的谓语 leave Obi completely 与 move elsewhere on the island，共用主语 the residents，用于引发思考。

sentences.en: Perhaps the jungle had grown so thick that axes were no longer a match for the dense undergrowth.
sentences.zh: 也许丛林已经长得太过茂密，以至于斧头再也对付不了浓密的下层植被了。

grammar.type: so...that 结果状语从句 + 过去完成时
grammar.note: 主干是 the jungle had grown so thick，had grown 用过去完成时表更早的状态；so...that... 引出结果状语从句 axes were no longer a match for the dense undergrowth，be a match for 表“比得上、对付得了”。

sentences.en: Perhaps people simply moved to the coast and turned to fishing rather than hunting as a means of survival.
sentences.zh: 也许人们只是迁到了海岸边，转而以捕鱼而非狩猎作为生存手段。

grammar.type: 并列谓语 + rather than 对比
grammar.note: 主干为并列谓语 people simply moved to the coast and turned to fishing；rather than hunting 表对比“而不是狩猎”；as a means of survival 为方式状语，说明目的。

sentences.en: Whatever the reason for the departure, there is no evidence for use of the Kelo shelters after this time, until about 1,000 years ago, when they were re-occupied by people who owned pottery as well as items made out of gold and silver.
sentences.zh: 无论离开的原因是什么，此后都没有证据表明凯洛庇护所曾被使用过，直到大约1,000年前，它们才被一群拥有陶器以及金银制品的人重新占用。

grammar.type: 让步状语 + There be + when 定语从句 + 定语从句
grammar.note: Whatever the reason for the departure 为让步状语（省略 is）；主干是 there is no evidence for use of the Kelo shelters；when they were re-occupied by people 为定语从句修饰 about 1,000 years ago；who owned pottery... 为定语从句修饰 people，made out of gold and silver 为过去分词修饰 items。

sentences.en: It seems likely, in view of Obi's location, that this final phase of occupation also saw the Kelo shelters used by people involved in the historic trade in spices between the Maluku islands and the rest of the world.
sentences.zh: 考虑到奥比岛的地理位置，很有可能的是，这最后一段居住时期还见证了凯洛庇护所被那些参与马鲁古群岛与世界其他地区之间历史性香料贸易的人所使用。

grammar.type: It 形式主语 + 插入语 + that 主语从句 + 过去分词定语
grammar.note: It 为形式主语，in view of Obi's location 为插入的介词短语，真正主语是 that 从句；从句主干 this final phase of occupation saw the Kelo shelters used by people，see sth done 表“见证某事发生”；involved in the historic trade in spices... 为过去分词短语修饰 people。

questions.title: Questions 1-7 · TRUE / FALSE / NOT GIVEN
instructions: Do the following statements agree with the information given in Reading Passage 1?
In boxes 1-7 on your answer sheet, write
TRUE if the statement agrees with the information
FALSE if the statement contradicts the information
NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this

items.prompt: Archaeological research had taken place on the island of Obi before the arrival of Ceri Shipton and his colleagues.
At the Kelo sites, the researchers found the first clam shell axes ever to be discovered in the region.
The size of Obi today is less than it was 18,000 years ago.
A change in the climate around 11,700 years ago had a greater impact on Obi than on the surrounding islands.
The researchers believe there is a connection between warmer, wetter weather and a change in the material used to make axes.
Shipton's team were surprised to find evidence of the Obi islanders' hunting practices.
It is thought that the Kelo shelters were occupied continuously until about 1,000 years ago.

questions.title: Questions 8-13 · Note completion
instructions: Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
Write your answers in boxes 8-13 on your answer sheet.

items.prompt: Excavations of rock shelters inside 8 ____ near the village of Kelo revealed:
axes made out of 9 ____ , dating from around 11,700 years ago
10 ____ of an animal: evidence of what ancient islanders ate
11 ____ which resembled ones found on other islands.
had 12 ____ as well as items made out of metal
probably took part in the production and sale of 13 ____ .

phrases.def: 逐岛跳跃的；一岛接一岛的
罗斯柴尔德袋貂（奥比岛特有的负鼠类动物）
